operation: Card Vaulting - Save for Future Use
description: v6 SDK card vaulting for saving payment methods with or without purchase

v6_pattern.initialization: Same as card fields - uses card fields session

usage_type.description: How the vault will be used

fields.id: Vault ID - use this for future charges

migration_steps.title: Add Save Card Checkbox
migration_steps.description: Add UI checkbox for users to opt-in to saving card

migration_steps.title: Pass Checkbox Value to Server
migration_steps.description: Send saveCard boolean when creating order
migration_steps.client_side: body: JSON.stringify({ amount, currency, saveCard: checkbox.checked })

migration_steps.title: Add Vault Directive Server-Side
migration_steps.description: Include vault object in payment_source.card.attributes when saveCard is true

migration_steps.title: Extract Vault Data from Capture
migration_steps.description: Get vault.id and vault.customer.id from capture response

migration_steps.title: Store Vault IDs in Database
migration_steps.description: Save vault.id and customer.id linked to your user

migration_steps.title: Use Vault ID for Future Payments
migration_steps.description: Pass vault_id in payment_source.card when creating orders

using_vaulted_card.note: Order can be immediately captured - no SDK interaction needed

list_payment_tokens.description: List all saved cards for a customer

critical_notes: Vault directive MUST be in payment_source.card.attributes (NOT at root level)
Vault data is in CAPTURE response, NOT order response
Use vault.id (not order ID) for future payments
Store vault.customer.id to list all cards for a customer
Client-side flow is same as regular card fields
No special SDK methods for vaulting - it's server-side
Vault data only appears if payment succeeds (ON_SUCCESS)
best_practices: Store vault IDs securely in your database
Display saved cards clearly to customers
Allow customers to manage (delete) saved cards
Log vault operations for audit trail
Don't store actual card numbers (use vault IDs only)
Check card expiry before using saved cards
